subject: english
topic_title: Essay Writing: Writing Minutes of a Meeting
learning_objectives: Explain what minutes of a meeting are
Identify the role of an agenda in minute writing
Write minutes in sequence from agenda items

sections.heading: Meaning
sections.content: Minutes are a record of events and discussions that took place at a meeting.

sections.heading: Use of Agenda
sections.content: A prepared agenda guides the order of discussion. The minutes should follow the sequence of agenda items.

sections.heading: Required Details
sections.content: The report should begin with the name of the club or association, the date and venue of the meeting, and the list of members present, then proceed item by item.
